policy_excerpt: We collect personal information when you use our website and apps. We use cookies and similar technologies. We share information with advertising partners and analytics providers. You can opt out of marketing. We store data in Australia and overseas including the United States. We take reasonable steps to protect your information. You can request access to your information by contacting our privacy officer.

apps.app_name: Open and transparent management of personal information
findings: Covers: personal information, privacy officer. Missing: Missing privacy contact details or complaint process
gaps: Missing privacy contact details or complaint process
recommendations: Add a named privacy contact with phone and email. Include a clear complaint process that mentions the OAIC as escalation.
apps.recommended_language: Add a named privacy contact with phone and email. Include a clear complaint process that mentions the OAIC as escalation.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No statement on anonymous or pseudonymous dealings
gaps: No statement on anonymous or pseudonymous dealings
recommendations: Add a statement about whether customers can interact anonymously. Most businesses in your sector need to verify identity, so explain why.
apps.recommended_language: Add a statement about whether customers can interact anonymously. Most businesses in your sector need to verify identity, so explain why.

findings: Covers: collect. Missing: Collection practices described but incomplete
recommendations: Specify exactly what personal information you collect (names, addresses, financial details, etc.) and why each type is necessary.
apps.recommended_language: Specify exactly what personal information you collect (names, addresses, financial details, etc.) and why each type is necessary.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No process for handling unsolicited personal information
gaps: No process for handling unsolicited personal information
recommendations: Add a section explaining what happens when you receive personal information you didn't ask for.
apps.recommended_language: Add a section explaining what happens when you receive personal information you didn't ask for.

apps.app_name: Notification of the collection of personal information
findings: Covers: overseas, access. Missing: Collection notice is missing key details
gaps: Collection notice is missing key details
recommendations: Your collection notice needs to cover: why you collect, who you share with, overseas transfers, and how to complain.
apps.recommended_language: Your collection notice needs to cover: why you collect, who you share with, overseas transfers, and how to complain.

apps.app_name: Use or disclosure of personal information
findings: Covers: use, share, share. Missing: Use and disclosure practices need more detail
gaps: Use and disclosure practices need more detail
recommendations: Be specific about which third parties receive personal information and for what purpose. Name categories (e.g., 'cloud hosting providers', 'payment processors').
apps.recommended_language: Be specific about which third parties receive personal information and for what purpose. Name categories (e.g., 'cloud hosting providers', 'payment processors').

findings: Covers: marketing, opt out of. Missing: Marketing opt-out process is incomplete
recommendations: Add a clear opt-out mechanism. Every marketing email needs an unsubscribe link, and you must honour requests within 5 business days.
apps.recommended_language: Add a clear opt-out mechanism. Every marketing email needs an unsubscribe link, and you must honour requests within 5 business days.

findings: Covers: overseas, overseas. Missing: Overseas disclosure missing countries or safeguards
gaps: Overseas disclosure missing countries or safeguards
recommendations: Name the countries where data is sent or stored, and explain what protections are in place for each.
apps.recommended_language: Name the countries where data is sent or stored, and explain what protections are in place for each.

apps.app_name: Adoption, use or disclosure of government related identifiers
findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No policy on handling government identifiers (TFN, licence, Medicare)
gaps: No policy on handling government identifiers (TFN, licence, Medicare)
recommendations: If you collect government IDs (driver's licence for verification, TFN for tax), explain how you protect them and that you don't use them as your customer identifier.
apps.recommended_language: If you collect government IDs (driver's licence for verification, TFN for tax), explain how you protect them and that you don't use them as your customer identifier.

findings: Covers: reasonable steps. Missing: No commitment to data accuracy, currency, or retention
gaps: No commitment to data accuracy, currency, or retention
recommendations: Commit to specific data quality practices: verifying information at collection, updating records when notified, and deleting data you no longer need.
apps.recommended_language: Commit to specific data quality practices: verifying information at collection, updating records when notified, and deleting data you no longer need.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No security measures, breach plan, or data disposal process described
gaps: No security measures, breach plan, or data disposal process described
recommendations: Add a security section covering: how you protect data (encryption, access controls), what happens in a breach, and how you dispose of data you no longer need.
apps.recommended_language: Add a security section covering: how you protect data (encryption, access controls), what happens in a breach, and how you dispose of data you no longer need.

findings: Covers: access, request, access to your. Missing: Access request process missing timeframes or details
gaps: Access request process missing timeframes or details
recommendations: Clarify the access request process: how to request, expected response time (30 days), any fees, and grounds for refusal.
apps.recommended_language: Clarify the access request process: how to request, expected response time (30 days), any fees, and grounds for refusal.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No process for correcting inaccurate personal information
gaps: No process for correcting inaccurate personal information
recommendations: Add a correction section. Individuals can request corrections to inaccurate information. Explain the process and that correction requests are free.
apps.recommended_language: Add a correction section. Individuals can request corrections to inaccurate information. Explain the process and that correction requests are free.

adm_check.recommendation: New rule from 10 December 2026: Tech companies commonly use algorithms that affect users. Content filtering, account suspension, and recommendation systems may all qualify. Common examples in your sector: content moderation, algorithmic recommendations, automated account decisions. If this applies, your policy must explain: what automated systems you use, what personal information feeds into them, how customers can request a human review, and how they can object to the decision.

next_steps: Week 1-2: Fix critical gaps first: Security (APP 11)
Week 5-6: Complete remaining gaps: Anonymity (APP 2), Unsolicited Collection (APP 4), Government ID (APP 9)
Document your security measures: how you store data, who can access it, and your breach response plan

10 Dec 2026 deadline: New automated decision-making rules likely apply to you. Tech companies commonly use algorithms that affect users. Content filtering, account suspension, and recommendation systems may all qualify.
